description: Training split sampled from the development environments. Trajectory and video entries should be added to the samples list.

mask_convention.missing_mask: 1 indicates an observed localization state; 0 indicates an unavailable state
mask_convention.reliability: Continuous confidence score in [0, 1]; larger values indicate more reliable localization

sample_schema.split: One of train, val, seen_test, unseen_test
sample_schema.trajectory_file: Relative path to the corresponding .npz file
sample_schema.video_file: Relative path to the synchronized .mp4 file
sample_schema.instruction_ids: List of annotation identifiers linked to this trajectory
sample_schema.degradation_types: Subset of point_dropout, block_outage, multipath_noise, nlos_bias, drift, false_fix, mixed
sample_schema.start_position_enu_m: Start position [east, north, up] in meters
sample_schema.goal_position_enu_m: Goal position [east, north, up] in meters
sample_schema.environment_type: One of open_space, urban_canyon, semi_structured, indoor
